_comment: Drop-in OpenClaw config for VulnForge. See README.md in this directory for the walkthrough. Pick EXACTLY ONE of the two entries under mcp.servers - delete the other one before saving.

vulnforge._description: Solo desktop, no auth. Delete this block and keep the one below if you're on a team server.

vulnforge-team._description: Team server with JWT auth. Replace vulnforge.acme.corp + vf_YOUR_TOKEN_HERE. Delete this block and keep the one above if you're on solo desktop.
